questions.question: Explain the primary function of a database management system (DBMS) in the database management system (DBMS) topic. (3 marks)
What is the difference between normalization and denormalization in database design? Provide an example to illustrate your answer. (6 marks)

A database contains two related tables, Customers and Orders. The Customers table has the following columns: CustomerID, Name, and Address. The Orders table has the following columns: OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate, and Total. (5 marks)
